title: N-Up PDF
metaDescription: Print multiple PDF pages per sheet. Create 2-up, 4-up, or custom layouts.
description:
N-Up PDF arranges multiple pages onto single sheets, creating 2-up, 4-up, 6-up, 9-up, or custom layouts. Perfect for saving paper when printing or creating handouts.

Choose from preset layouts or create custom arrangements. The tool automatically scales and positions pages for optimal results.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Create and Download
howToUse.description: Click Create to generate the n-up PDF and download.

useCases.title: Save Paper
useCases.description: Print multiple pages per sheet to reduce paper usage.

useCases.title: Create Handouts
useCases.description: Make compact handouts from presentation slides.

useCases.title: Review Documents
useCases.description: Print documents in reduced size for review.

faq.question: What layouts are available?
faq.answer: 2-up, 4-up, 6-up, 9-up, and custom grid layouts are available.

faq.question: Can I add borders between pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add borders and gutters between pages.

faq.question: Is page order preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, pages are arranged in reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom).
